markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content performance and define the Q4 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Conversion Gap:** High traffic to Tool pages (now \#2 on-site) is not converting to demos or trials. GrowthX will test stronger CTAs to fix this.
  - [**Q4 Strategy:** The Q4 strategy will pivot to an "AI Service Desk" cluster, prioritizing the AI story and Siit's unique "unified data" angle.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** GrowthX will deliver a keyword-researched Q4 content plan by Friday, with production starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [**Action Items:** Carmel will review articles, fix Tool page categories, and provide GrowthX with all available AI/product messaging collateral.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)

## Topics

### Problem: High Traffic, Low Conversion

  - [Tool pages are now the second-most popular pages on the site, driving significant traffic, including referrals from ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [This traffic is not converting to demos or trials, creating a pipeline gap.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** GrowthX will test stronger CTAs on Tool pages to improve conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current "Alternatives" section at the end of pages is not an effective conversion driver.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Solution: Q4 Content Strategy Pivot

  - [The Q4 strategy will pivot to an "AI Service Desk" cluster, prioritizing the AI story.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This aligns with Siit's evolving product narrative and market trends (e.g., competitor Serval's recent funding).](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Focus:** The strategy will target specific, achievable keywords (e.g., "AI powered help desk agents") to build authority and rank, avoiding broad, high-difficulty terms.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [A secondary theme will be Siit's unique "unified data" story.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
      - [**Angle:** Siit centralizes data from all internal tools into a unique data model to drive operations and efficiency—a story competitors are not telling.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)

### Content Pipeline & Logistics

  - [**Tool Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
      - [All missing tools have been added.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will review and correct tool categories (e.g., move ServiceNow to "ITSM," add "HRIS").](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will send GrowthX the "ITSM guides" created by Becerra and Jess to source new tool pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Glossary:** A healthy backlog of topics exists. GrowthX can add new research buckets for Q4 if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Q4 Plan Delivery:** GrowthX will deliver the full Q4 content strategy by Friday, October 24.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
      - [Review and provide feedback on the latest articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
      - [Correct tool categories in the Webflow backend.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Send GrowthX the "ITSM guides" and all available AI/product messaging collateral.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
      - [Deliver the complete Q4 content strategy by Friday, October 24.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [Discuss Tool page conversion improvements with Jacob and report back.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
      - [Fix minor meta description issues.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZ8yxaaHvKXZNkGF-ejJxDq51WGx6sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
